intent: Build a simple Python task management library (tasklib). It is not a production system. Its purpose is to validate that the Crafted Dev Agent build pipeline can close a complete dependency chain — from documentation through scaffold to working code — with real merges at each step.
scope_statement:
Build a minimal Python task management library (tasklib) as defined in TRD-TASKLIB to validate the Crafted Dev Agent build pipeline's ability to close a complete dependency chain — from documentation through scaffold to working code — with real merges at each step. The deliverable is a five-layer dependency chain (docs → scaffold → task model → in-memory store → CLI) with zero external dependencies, comprising documentation PRs (README, ARCHITECTURE, API), a package scaffold under src/tasklib/, a Task dataclass with TaskStatus enumeration, an InMemoryTaskStore with add/get/list/complete/delete operations, and a CLI entry point supporting add/list/complete commands.

Ambiguity clarifications:

prd_plan.title: Documentation Foundation — README, ARCHITECTURE, and API Reference for tasklib
Package Scaffold — directory tree, __init__.py sentinels, and tasklib-scoped pyproject.toml
Task Model — Task dataclass and TaskStatus enumeration with validation and serialization
In-Memory Task Store — InMemoryTaskStore with full CRUD operations
CLI Entry Point — argparse-based add/list/complete commands

1.title: Add tasklib documentation foundation — README, ARCHITECTURE, and API reference
1.summary: Creates the three foundational documentation files under src/tasklib/docs/ that form Layer 0 of the tasklib dependency chain. README.md describes library purpose, package structure, and usage examples. ARCHITECTURE.md describes the five-layer design with dependency diagram. API.md documents Task fields, TaskStatus values, InMemoryTaskStore operations, and CLI commands with arguments and example output. No code is included.

2.title: Add tasklib package scaffold
2.summary: Creates the minimal src/tasklib package skeleton and CLI package directories required for downstream implementation without adding runtime logic. Only __init__.py files and test directory markers.

3.title: Implement tasklib core task model types
3.summary: Defines the TaskStatus enumeration and Task dataclass that serve as the core public data model for tasklib, matching the contracts specified in the API documentation.

4.title: Implement in-memory task store
4.summary: Adds InMemoryTaskStore with add, get, list, complete, and delete operations using the Task model contracts from PR-3. All operations are validated against the documented API behavior.

5.title: Implement tasklib CLI entry point
5.summary: Adds a standard-library-only CLI supporting add, list, and complete commands backed by the in-memory task store and matching the documented CLI behavior in API.md.

6.title: Add tasklib end-to-end integration tests
6.summary: Adds focused integration tests validating the complete dependency chain from Task model through InMemoryTaskStore to CLI command behavior, ensuring all layers conform to the documented API contracts.
